claims.text: French regulation imposes 10 years liability on certain construction work
claims.snippet: French regulation imposes 10 years liability on certain construction work

claims.text: Mandatory statutory regulation (Law dated 31/01/1975 applicable in NC since 1997!)
claims.snippet: Mandatory statutory regulation (Law dated 31/01/1975 applicable in NC since 1997!)

claims.text: Failure to provide the bank guarantee may invalidate the subcontract agreement
claims.snippet: Failure to provide the bank guarantee may invalidate the subcontract agreement

claims.text: In 2010, a New Caledonian Labour Law Code was passed

claims.text: Facilitation of overhours authorisation up to 60 hours per week (subject to conditions)
claims.snippet: Facilitation of overhours authorisation up to 60 hours per week (subject to conditions)

claims.text: working hours: maximum of 10 hours daily, 40 hours weekly and 169 hours monthly

claims.text: works modifying the structure or infrastructure of mining or metallurgical activities' → fall under the Special Regime.
claims.snippet: works modifying the structure or infrastructure of mining or metallurgical activities' → fall under the Special Regime.

claims.text: No definition of 'works modifying the structure or infrastructure of mining or metallurgical activities' and no precedent. → Discretion of the Government.
claims.snippet: No definition of 'works modifying the structure or infrastructure of mining or metallurgical activities' and no precedent. → Discretion of the Government.

claims.text: Positive discrimination to favor employment of New Caledonian citizen or long term resident (Priority person)
claims.snippet: Positive discrimination to favor employment of New Caledonian citizen or long term resident (Priority person)

claims.snippet: Procedure: jobs must be advertised for a set period of time, if no Priority persons qualified for the job, then a foreign employee may be engaged
